sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 1.2g. saturated fat, polyunsaturated fat, and omega3 are doing most of the work. for a legume, fibre and practicality are supposed to carry the case.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 1.2g. saturated fat, polyunsaturated fat, and omega3 are doing most of the work. for a legume, fibre and practicality are supposed to carry the case.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 62.6g. the fibre support does a lot of the heavy lifting. for legumes, the carb story matters less when fibre and protein are both backing it up.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 21.4g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. legumes need protein support to feel worth the carbs.
